style_effects: Constant static sparks of electric blue and white streak through the air around Gyarados, crackling with energetic intensity as they drift upward in erratic patterns. A pulsing electric aura of vibrant cyan radiates from its body, forming a dynamic, rippling distortion field that bends light around it, while its eyes and tail emit a bright, rhythmic glow of pure white light. The atmosphere is charged with a sharp, invigorating energy under a cool, electric-blue lighting mood that highlights every spark and trail. Clean cel-shaded Pokémon illustration style with bold outlines and soft shading.
